title: fraxinus pubescens var. ovata
intro: Fraxinus pubescens var. ovata, also known as the smooth-leaf ash, is a deciduous tree native to eastern Asia, characterized by its distinctive smooth leaf margins and compound leaves. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The smooth-leaf ash is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Fraxinus pubescens var. ovata are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
